Author: namibj
Content: I think the idea is that, presuming you'd be somewhat tight on time around now to spend on writing that sram-focused testbench, @Rob Taylor could speed up the sram testing by communicating with you to determine how the testing could be reasonably set up in the place that you'd have to test the COBs that I assume are due in a few days (going by the others who shared their shipping timelines), and then writing that testbench for you so you'd at least not start from scratch with it even if you have to tune/adapt it a bit to your equipment in live testing/live debugging.
